description: name field is 'html-ppt-presenter-mode' but folder is 'html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal'; master html-ppt/SKILL.md references this template as presenter-mode-reveal — daemon will register wrong name and full-deck template will never activate
suggested_fix: Change name to html-ppt-presenter-mode-reveal

description: name: saas-landing collides with docs/examples/saas-landing-skill/SKILL.md which declares the same name; whichever loads second silently shadows the first in the daemon skill registry
suggested_fix: Rename docs/examples/saas-landing-skill name to saas-landing-example or move examples out of skills-loadable scan paths

description: name: saas-landing collides with skills/saas-landing/SKILL.md; this is the example copy — rename to disambiguate
suggested_fix: Change name to saas-landing-example

description: postinstall hook fires node ./scripts/postinstall.mjs on every pnpm install; script content verified: runs pnpm build on 5 internal workspace packages only — no network access, no remote code execution
suggested_fix: No action required; add a comment in postinstall.mjs listing the exact allowed package set to prevent silent future expansion

description: Chrome launched with --no-sandbox reducing renderer isolation; acceptable for local CI but risks being inadvertently used in cloud/shared environments
suggested_fix: Gate --no-sandbox behind CHROME_NO_SANDBOX=1 env var; default off

description: subprocess.run(["curl",...]) calls https://api.openai.com/v1/images/edits and /generations with OPENAI_API_KEY from os.environ; key visible in process args (visible to ps/proc)
suggested_fix: Replace subprocess curl with Python requests library; pass API key as header dict, never as process arg

description: Writes to ~/.codex/ and reads CODEX_HOME env var, creating side-effects outside project root that persist after run completion
suggested_fix: Gate ~/.codex writes behind explicit CODEX_HOME env var; document side-effect in SKILL.md output contract

description: Chrome path hardcoded to /Applications/Google Chrome.app/... (macOS only); silently fails on Linux/Windows CI
suggested_fix: Add cross-platform Chrome discovery: check google-chrome, chromium-browser, then macOS path in order

description: Uses spawnSync to invoke pnpm build; low risk (internal packages only) but any future addition to the package list could introduce supply-chain exposure without re-review
suggested_fix: Add inline comment listing exact allowed packages; add automated check to prevent unauthorized additions

description: od block fields are scattered across skill body rather than structured YAML frontmatter; triggers absent from YAML header making the skill undiscoverable by daemon trigger matching
suggested_fix: Restructure frontmatter to include standard od block with mode, platform, scenario, preview, design_system; add triggers list

description: od block contains only mode and scenario; missing platform, preview, design_system; no explicit output contract section
suggested_fix: Complete od block with all required fields; add output contract section specifying audit report format

description: 4-bullet workflow insufficient for structured invoice output; output contract omits field inventory and file format; vague: some, appropriate
suggested_fix: Expand workflow to specify field-by-field output structure; enumerate required invoice fields; remove vague quantifiers

description: 3-bullet workflow; output contract missing required field inventory; vague: some, relevant
suggested_fix: Add numbered workflow steps; define output structure with section headers; replace vague quantifiers

description: 4-bullet workflow; no output schema for the spec document produced; vague: some, appropriate
suggested_fix: Add structured workflow; specify output schema (sections, required fields, format); remove vague quantifiers

description: 3-bullet workflow; output contract omits OKR structure (objective count, key result format); vague: some
suggested_fix: Define explicit OKR output structure; add numbered workflow; remove vague quantifiers

description: No artifact tag in output contract; skill dispatches to external tool without specifying returned artifact shape or MIME type; vague: some, various
suggested_fix: Document the artifact shape returned by the dispatcher; specify MIME type and delivery mechanism; remove vague quantifiers

description: Explicitly suppresses artifact tag emission without documenting the alternative delivery path; consumers cannot determine how to receive output; vague: some, various
suggested_fix: Document the non-artifact delivery mechanism; explain how output is surfaced to user

description: Inline dispatch with no standalone output contract; consumer cannot determine artifact type without reading dispatcher implementation; vague: some
suggested_fix: Add output contract section specifying video artifact format and delivery path

description: No triggers or od block; pure style reference with no indication it is non-dispatchable; a skill-loading scanner will flag it as incomplete without this context
suggested_fix: Add a comment or frontmatter field (e.g., od.dispatchable: false) to mark this as a reference-only style guide

description: No triggers or od block; pure style reference for CRT terminal / tactical telemetry aesthetic; undocumented as non-dispatchable
suggested_fix: Mark as reference-only with od.dispatchable: false or equivalent frontmatter annotation

description: No triggers or od block; pure editorial-minimalist style reference; undocumented as non-dispatchable
suggested_fix: Mark as reference-only with od.dispatchable: false or equivalent frontmatter annotation

description: No triggers or od block; editorial-minimalist web prototype style reference (warm monochrome, serif display); undocumented as non-dispatchable
suggested_fix: Mark as reference-only with od.dispatchable: false or equivalent frontmatter annotation

description: No triggers or od block; Apple-tier soft premium style reference; undocumented as non-dispatchable
suggested_fix: Mark as reference-only with od.dispatchable: false or equivalent frontmatter annotation

description: Focused-entry skill delegates to master html-ppt but lacks standalone output contract and od.example_prompt; delegation is implicit and undocumented
suggested_fix: Add od.delegates_to: html-ppt field and a one-line output contract referencing the master skill's contract

description: name: magazine-web-ppt does not match folder name guizang-ppt; inconsistency confuses skill registry lookups even without hard collision
suggested_fix: Either rename folder to magazine-web-ppt or change name field to guizang-ppt; update any cross-references

description: Vague: some, appropriate; subagent script paths partially assume Codex environment without documenting cross-environment portability requirements
suggested_fix: Replace vague quantifiers with specific counts or thresholds; document minimum required environment variables in od block

description: Artifact hand-off from the hyperframes engine is not explicitly contracted; consumer must read dispatcher implementation to understand output shape; vague: some
suggested_fix: Add explicit output contract section; document the video artifact format and delivery path

description: Single-line @AGENTS.md redirect provides no NLPM frontmatter or project summary; acceptable as delegation pattern but undiscoverable by skill indexing
suggested_fix: No change needed if delegation is intentional; optionally add a comment noting AGENTS.md is the primary instruction source
